name: COA-7967 Daily Plan shows current day and practice
description: Opens Today and verifies the Daily Plan day switcher and Daily Practice content visible for the existing-progress account.
descriptionHtml: Opens Today and verifies the Daily Plan day switcher and Daily Practice content visible for the existing-progress account.

testStage.description: Opens Today and verifies the Daily Plan day switcher and Daily Practice content visible for the existing-progress account.

steps.name: Close PDF guide upsell if it is displayed
Close notification prompt if it is displayed
Verify that the authorized dashboard is displayed
Verify Daily Plan header and current day are displayed
